mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_order (order_id, buyer_id, shop_id, order_no, total_price, order_status, create_time, last_edit_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{buyer.userId}, #{shop.shopId}, #{orderNo}, #{totalPrice}, #{orderStatus}, #{createTime}, #{lastEditTime})

INSERT INTO tb_order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, unit_price, quantity, total_price, create_time) VALUES (#{order.orderId}, #{product.productId}, #{product.productName}, #{unitPrice}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice}, #{createTime})
